title: Audio Switcher
description: Audio Switcher lets you toggle your master audio level with a hotkey, offering quick and customizable sound control for smoother gameplay.
body:
# Audio Switcher
Audio Switcher Mod is a simple yet highly functional Minecraft mod designed to enhance your in-game audio control. This mod allows players to toggle their master audio level quickly and seamlessly using a customizable hotkey. Ideal for moments when you need to adjust sound levels on the fly, whether you're sneaking around mobs, communicating with friends, or switching between quieter and more immersive gameplay.

## Configuration
The mod features a configuration menu via [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) where you can set your preferred maximum and minimum audio levels, tailoring the sound toggles to your exact needs. Players can easily switch between these preset levels without diving into the settings menu. The mod is compatible with single-player and multiplayer modes and works well alongside other audio-related mods.
![Config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d540438fbe96a25123c2e9647475d58907106ac.png)
